2297260.name: The Gunslinger
2297260.description:
About

The Gunslinger is an minimalist action-roguelike where you will fight against waves of endless enemies. With each victory, you will be able to unlock new upgrades, making you stronger and better able to take on even more foes.

Features

  • Earn resources to unlock upgrade & create game-breaking builds!
  • Fight against endless waves of enemies with varying difficulty types, how far can you make it?
  • Upgrade timer, only have access to upgrades every 30 seconds
  • Limit life count
  • Various custom game modes
